summary: Mixed reception – fans love the longer Bird Song and the first‑set L.S.D. ending, but recording details are unclear
review: One reviewer gushes that this show is simply great (4 ★), while another gives it no stars and only notes a longer Bird Song and an LSD first‑set closer without strong enthusiasm. No specific comments about the source or sound quality were made, so the technical side remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews provide limited detail; one is clearly positive and the other low‑rating with neutral comments. Show quality gets modest credit for highlighted songs, while recording quality cannot be assessed.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentioned soundboard, audience bleed, clarity, or any mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note a longer Bird Song and that L.S.D. serves as the first‑set closer, suggesting a relaxed but memorable set pacing.
